verses.text: Kumpi Nebukhadnezzar in a tun pi sawmkua a sang, a vailam pi kua a gol kham milim golpi khat bawlsak a, Babylon gamsung Dura zanglei-ah a koih hi

Kumpipa in a milian khempeuh, kumpi tapate, gam ukpite, gam ukpi huhte, mangpite, sumkem mangte, thukhen mangte, khuapi uk mangte leh milian dangte khempeuh, kumpipa' milim bawl apna-ah a paikim ciat dingin sapna thu a pia hi
Tua ahih ciangin tua mangliante khempeuh milim apna dingin milim mai-ah a ding uh hi
Tua ciangin nakpi takin taangkona khat kibawl a, “Minam tuamtuamte leh paunam tuamtuamte khempeuh aw

Peengkul ging na za ding uh a, tua khit ciangin tamngaite, laia lasakna gingte, harp lasakna gingte, gawsemte, leh tumtheih a tuamtuamte a hong kitum ciangin Kumpi Nebukhadnezzar' koih kham milim mai-ah kunin na bia ding uh hi
A kunlo, a bialo peuhmah thakhat thu-in mei phualpi sungah kikhul pah ding hi,” a ci hi
Tua mah bangin minam kimte, minam tuamtuamte leh paunam tuamtuamte khempeuh in tumtheih gingte a zak phetun kunsukin Kumpi Nebukhadnezzar' kham milim koih a bia uh hi
Tua ciangin Babylon mite pawlkhat pai-in Jew mite a heksim uh hi
Amaute in Kumpi Nebukhadnezzar' kiangah, “Kumpipa aw, na khan' sau hen
Kumpipa in, tumtheihte a hong kitum khit phetin mi khempeuh kham milim mai-ah kunin bia ding uh hi, ci-in thu na pia khinzo hi
Tua milim mai-ah kunloin, a bialo khempeuh mei phualpi sungah a kikhul ding ahi hi

Babylon gam a khen liante a uk dingin na koih Shadrak, Meshak, leh Abednego a kici Jew mi pawlkhat a om uh hi. Amaute in kumpipa' thupiakna a mang kei uh hi. Amaute in na pasian bia nuamloin, na milim koih mai-ah a kun nuam kei uh hi,” a ci uh hi
Tua thu hangin kumpipa heh mahmah a, tua mi thumte ama mai-ah a kipaipihna ding thu a pia hi
Amah in, “Shadrak, Meshak, leh Abednego-te aw, ka pasian bianuam loin, ka kham milim koih mai-ah kun nuamlo na hi uh hiam

Tua ahih ciangin tu-in peengkulte, tamngaite, laia lasakna gingte, harp lasakna gingte, gawsem, leh tumtheih dang a gingte na zak khit phet uh ciangin kunin milim na bia ding uh hi. Na biak kei uh leh thakhatin mei phualpi sungah hong kikhul ding ahih ciangin a hong honkhiazo ding pasian omin um na hi uh hiam?” a ci hi
Shadrak, Meshak, leh Abednego-te in Kumpi Nebukhadnezzar kiangah, “Kumpipa aw, hih thu kong dawng kei ding uh hi
Mei phualpi sung panin a hong honkhia thei pasian a om leh ka biak ka Pasian uh hi ding a, na khutsung panin a hong honkhia ding hi
Kumpipa aw, a hong hotkhiat kei zenzen leh zong, na pasian lah ka bia tuan kei ding uh a, na kham milim mai-ah zong ka kun kei ding uh hi, ci-in theita in,” a ci uh hi

Tua ciangin Kumpi Nebukhadnezzar pen Shadrak, Meshak, leh Abednego-te tungah heh mahmah ahih manin a mai a san pempam hi. A sat ngeinazah sangin a zah sagihvei a sazaw mei phualpi a cih dingin a mite thu a pia hi
Tua ciangin Shadrak, Meshak, leh Abednego-te a hencip ding leh mei phualpi sungah a khul dingin galkap thahat khempeuh thu a pia hi
Tua ciangin amaute puanak leh puantualpi silhsa leh lukhu khusa-in hencip uh a, mei phualpi sungah a khul uh hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh kumpipa' thupiakna kinawh lua mahmah a, mei phualpi lah sa lua mahmah ahih manin a khulte nangawn meikuang in hullum hi
Tua ahih ciangin Shadrak, Meshak, leh Abednego-te hencipsa-in meikuangpi laizangah a kiasuk uh hi

Tua ciangin Nebukhadnezzar in lamdangsa mahmahin a ding vat hi. Amah in a thudotte kiangah, “Mihing thum hencipsa-in mei phualpi sungah khul hilo ihi hiam?” ci-in a dong hi. Amaute in, “Hi mah hi, Kumpipa aw,” ci-in a dawngkik uh hi

“Tua ahih leh bang hangin meikuang sungah mihing li a kawi paipai mu ka hi hiam? Amaute lah kihenciplo a, liam zong liam tuak beeklo uh hi. A lina penpa hoh pasian-te khat tawh a kibang hi,” ci-in a dong hi

Tua ahih ciangin Nebukhadnezzar zong mei phualpi kong gei-ah paito a, “Shadrak! Meshak! Abednego! A lianpen Pasian' nasemte hong paikhia un,” ci-in a sam hi. Tua ciangin amaute zong thakhatin a hong paikhia pah uh hi

Kumpi tapate, gam ukpite, gam ukpi huhte, leh kumpipa' thudotte khempeuh kikhawm uh a, mei in a katloh mite a en uh hi. A sam uh zang khat beek mei in kanghullo a, a puan uh zong kangloin meikhu gim zong a nam beek kei uh hi

Tua ciangin kumpipa in, “Shadrak, Meshak, leh Abednego-te' Pasian phat un. Amah in a vantung mite sawl a, amah a muang ama nasem hih mite a honkhia hi. Amaute in ka thupiakna mangloin, amau' Pasian longal pasian dang' mai-ah kun nuamlo, bia nuamlo uh ahih manin mei phualpi sungah khul ding a utzaw uh ahi hi,” a ci hi

“Tu-in minam kimte, minam tuamtuamte, paunam tuamtuamte, mi khat peuhpeuh in Shadrak, Meshak, leh Abednego-te' Pasian gensiatna kampau a om leh kibanengawp ding a, a inn uh kisuksiatsak ding hi, ci-in thukham ka bawl hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh hih bangin a hon thei pasian dang om peuhmahlo hi,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin kumpipa in Shadrak, Meshak, leh Abednego-te Babylon gam khen liante-ah a golzaw ukna za a pia hi.
